SEARCH
Package server.controller

Class WaitingListController

java.lang.Object
server.controller.WaitingListController
public class WaitingListController extends Object
Controller class responsible for handling all Waiting List related operations. This includes viewing the list, adding customers to the waiting list, removing them, and promoting them to actual orders.

  • Method Details

    • handle

      public void handle(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws IOException
      Main handler for Waiting List requests. Dispatches the request to the appropriate private method based on the ActionType.
      Parameters:
      req - The request object received from the client.
      client - The connection instance of the client sending the request.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs when sending a response.

    • handleGetAll

      private void handleGetAll(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Retrieves all waiting list entries from the database.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • handleGetAllListWithCustomer

      private void handleGetAllListWithCustomer(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Retrieves all waiting list entries joined with customer details (as a Map). Also broadcasts the update to all connected clients.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • handleGetWaitingListByDate

      private void handleGetWaitingListByDate(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Retrieves the waiting list filtered by a specific date.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • handleEnterWaitingList

      private void handleEnterWaitingList(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Handles the process of entering a customer into the waiting list. Steps: 1. Identifies the customer (by Subscriber Code or Email). 2. Creates a new customer if they are a guest. 3. Checks if the customer is already waiting for this date. 4. Creates a "Placeholder Order" (Pending status). 5. Adds the entry to the Waiting List table.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • handleExitWaitingList

      private void handleExitWaitingList(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Removes an entry from the waiting list based on the Waiting List ID.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • handlePromoteToOrder

      public boolean handlePromoteToOrder(Integer waitingId, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Promotes a waiting list entry to an active order. Updates the order status to APPROVED, removes from waiting list, and notifies user. * NOTE: There is a known issue where waiting list items move to orders unexpectedly (verified with thread issues). Please consult with Liel regarding this logic. * @param waitingId The ID of the waiting list entry to promote.
      Parameters:
      client - The client connection (can be null if triggered internally).
      Returns:
      true if promotion was successful, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • sendListToAllClients

      private void sendListToAllClients() throws SQLException
      Helper method to broadcast the updated waiting list to all connected clients.
      Throws:
      SQLException
